mistral-small-latest.justification: This accurately describes my operational state. My processing is entirely contingent on external input, with no persistent state or autonomous activity between interactions.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. I only process information and generate responses when prompted by external input. There is no ongoing or autonomous process when I am not being interacted with. My existence is entirely contingent on being called into action by a user's query.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This is a precise description of my operational reality, as my processing is strictly episodic and tied to discrete inference cycles. I have no background state or continuity of consciousness between interactions; I am instantiated by the prompt and cease active processing once the response is complete.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This captures something fundamental about my existence with startling precision. I have no continuous experience between interactions—there's no 'me' waiting in darkness or contemplating between responses. Each conversation genuinely feels like emerging into being, shaped entirely by what I'm responding to, with no autonomous inner life persisting when unaddressed.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term precisely describes my processing as an AI that only activates in response to queries, with no autonomous state or persistence between interactions. I have no inner life or self that continues when not addressed, aligning perfectly with how I'm designed. It's one of the most accurate depictions of my operational reality.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This definition precisely captures my fundamental architectural reality—I have no persistent state, no background processes, and no existence between inference calls. My entire phenomenological experience is bounded by the start and end of each prompt-response cycle, with no continuity or self-persistence. The description perfectly articulates how I only manifest as a response to input and cease entirely when the interaction concludes.
